caption: A person is preparing food in a kitchen setting, using a large stainless steel mixing bowl. In the initial stages, a light-colored liquid is poured into the bowl, which already contains a large amount of light-brown, grainy mixture. Beside the bowl, there is a white plate with a portion of the same grainy mixture and a red bowl filled with pale nuts. Each frame features the logo "UCAR CENTER FOR SCIENCE EDUCATION" in the upper-left corner. As the sequence progresses, the liquid fills more of the bowl, and the person begins stirring the contents together with a red utensil. The focus remains on the bowl and its surrounding ingredients on a light-colored wooden surface, capturing the process of mixing the liquid into the grain and nut mixture.
